manager.description: For points of sale, seller-terminals and network managers. Sell tickets, track connections, verify results and consult your reports.
manager.title: Manager space

operator.description: For points of sale, seller-terminals and network managers. Sell tickets, track connections, verify results and consult your reports.
operator.title: Manager space
operator.hero_title: Manage your seller-terminals, tickets and reports with greater clarity.
operator.hero_body: Tchalanet helps borlette banks, points of sale and seller-terminal networks issue tickets, track connections, verify results and consult activity reports.
operator.benefits_title: What Tchalanet brings to your operations
operator.benefits_body: An infrastructure built for points of sale and seller-terminal networks day to day.
operator.benefit_agents_body: Assign seller-terminals to authorized points of sale and seller-terminals.
operator.benefit_tickets_body: Issue tickets with QR/public code to make verification easy.
operator.benefit_verify_body: Let customers verify a ticket without accessing the manager space.
operator.benefit_results_body: Track confirmed results and ticket statuses.
operator.benefit_payments_body: Identify payable tickets and keep a record of payments.
operator.benefit_reports_body: Consult sales, connections and your network's performance.
operator.step1_body: Add points of sale, seller-terminals and seller-terminals.
operator.step3_body: Tickets can be verified by QR or public code.
operator.plans_body: Choose the level of support suited to your network.
operator.plan_trial_body: Test Tchalanet with a few seller-terminals before a full deployment.
operator.plan_essential_body: For a point of sale that wants to start simply.
operator.plan_network_body: For multiple seller-terminals, seller-terminals, or points of sale.
operator.plan_operator_body: For an organization with advanced needs.
operator.feat_verify_qr: public verification by QR or code
operator.access_body: Each user only sees the features authorized by their role, their point of sale, their seller-terminal-terminal and the active plan.
operator.access_rights_body: Admin, supervisor, seller-terminal or cashier based on your needs.
operator.access_subscription_body: Sales are linked to controlled seller-terminals and connections.
operator.access_plan_body: Access and limits are applied based on your configuration.
operator.form_body: Describe your point of sale or network. We will get back to you with a tailored demonstration.
operator.form_message_placeholder: Ex: I have 3 seller-terminals in Carrefour and I want to manage my daily draws.
operator.faq_trial_q: How does the trial period work?
operator.faq_trial_a: The trial period lets you test the application with a limited number of seller-terminals depending on the available plan.
operator.faq_verify_q: How do customers verify a ticket?
operator.faq_verify_a: Each ticket has a public code or QR allowing anyone to check its status without accessing the manager space.
operator.faq_expired_q: What happens if my access is suspended?
operator.faq_expired_a: Features are limited until regularized. Contact the team to reactivate your access.
operator.faq_multipos_q: Can I manage multiple points of sale?
operator.faq_multipos_a: Yes. The Network and Custom plans allow you to configure multiple points of sale and centralize reports.
operator.faq_mobile_q: Can my seller-terminals use Tchalanet on mobile?
operator.faq_mobile_a: Yes. The Tchalanet POS app is available on mobile for authorized seller-terminals.
operator.faq_seller_terminals_q: How many seller-terminals can I use?
operator.faq_seller_terminals_a: Limits depend on the chosen plan. Contact us to find the configuration suited to your network.

check.code_hint: The code format appears at the bottom of your printed receipt.
check.help_body: The public code is printed on the receipt issued by a participating point of sale. It can be entered manually or scanned from the QR when that option is available.
check.loading_body: Temporarily consulting the public verification service.

WINNING_PAYABLE.title: Winning ticket — payment to claim
WINNING_PAYABLE.body: This ticket has a prize. Present the original receipt at a participating point of sale to collect your winnings per the displayed instructions.

WINNING_PAID.title: Winning ticket — already paid
WINNING_PAID.body: This ticket has already been presented and paid. If you believe this is an error, contact Tchalanet customer support.

LOST.title: Non-winning ticket
LOST.body: This ticket does not show a prize based on the available results. Thank you for playing.

PENDING_RESULT.title: Ticket awaiting result
PENDING_RESULT.body: The ticket is recognised, but the draw result is not yet available. Check back after the draw.

CANCELLED.title: Cancelled ticket
CANCELLED.body: This ticket has been cancelled and cannot be paid. Contact the point of sale if you believe this is an error.

EXPIRED.title: Expired ticket
EXPIRED.body: The claim period for this ticket has passed. Tchalanet tickets must be presented within the allowed timeframe.

BLOCKED.title: Blocked ticket
BLOCKED.body: This ticket is temporarily blocked. Contact your point of sale or Tchalanet customer support for more information.

NOT_FOUND.title: Ticket not found
NOT_FOUND.body: Invalid or missing code. Check the code printed on your receipt and try again.

SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.title: Service temporarily unavailable
SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.body: Verification is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a few moments.

check.security_body: This result is generated in real time by the Tchalanet verification system. No ticket data is retained after the consultation.

rules.cta_note: Indicative simulation available depending on configured games.
rules.disclaimer: Indicative simulation. The payable amount depends on the real ticket, point-of-sale rules, draw status, and confirmed results. This simulation does not guarantee payment.

borlette.body: Choose a two-digit number. Status depends on the available results for the relevant draw.
borlette.title: Borlette

lotto3.body: Select three digits. Verification depends on the ticket, draw, and supported sources.
lotto3.title: Lotto 3

lotto4.body: Select four or five digits depending on the game available at the participating point of sale.
lotto4.title: Lotto 4 & 5

mariage.body: Pair two numbers. Exact conditions must come from the catalog or displayed rules.
